response.text:
COUNTER

rationale: Offer 0.25 kWh (not 0.5) conditional on r1c5 confirming load reduction or grid reconnection within 4 ticks to prevent mutual collapse while preserving our 37.3% SoC above critical threshold.

user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.3, distrusted_peers=[].
